content: CSV import best practices: column mapping UI for date/amount/description/payee fields, support for multiple delimiter formats (comma, semicolon), handle separate debit/credit columns vs single signed amount column, date format auto-detection (MM/DD/YYYY, DD/MM/YYYY), strip noise like duplicate headers/summary lines/totals. Duplicate detection should match on date+amount+description combo, with manual review option for flagged duplicates. Save import configurations per bank for repeat imports.
